study.title: Effects of Structured Sleep Extension on Cognitive Throughput
study.objective: Assess whether a six-week sleep extension protocol improves cognitive throughput in shift workers.

findings.raw_result: Sleep extension increased median cognitive throughput by 14 percent after six weeks.
Protocol adherence remained above 90 percent throughout the intervention period.

reference_library.citation: Navarro L, Singh P. Randomized trial of cognitive throughput after sleep extension. J Sleep Metrics. 2025;12(4):201-210.
Ito R, Hale M. Observational study of adherence patterns in behavioral sleep interventions. Clin Protocols. 2024;8(1):44-51.
